text: On the regulatory front, Amazon published a lengthy rebuttal to a Wall Street Journal report that claimed the company had increased prices on popular items since President Trump announced tariff plans. This dispute highlights ongoing scrutiny of Amazon's pricing practices in the context of trade policy developments. Meanwhile, broader market conditions remain supportive, with a US-EU tariff pact easing trade war concerns that could affect multinational technology companies.
